root_cause_summary: AttributeError occurs because get_user_email_domain method incorrectly uses 'email_address' attribute instead of 'email' on User model. The User model (models.py) defines 'email' field, not 'email_address'.

candidate_targets.rationale: Traceback points directly to line 62 in get_user_email_domain method. Contains comment '# BUG: Using wrong attribute name 'email_address' instead of 'email'' confirming the issue. Exact location of the error.
candidate_targets.change_summary: Change user.email_address to user.email on line 62

candidate_targets.rationale: Contains tests for get_user_email_domain method. Should verify the fix works correctly and doesn't break existing tests.
candidate_targets.change_summary: Update test assertions if needed to ensure they use correct attribute name

candidate_targets.rationale: Contains get_user method that calls repository. While not directly causing the error, could have related issues if similar attribute name confusion exists elsewhere.
candidate_targets.change_summary: Review for similar attribute name issues (low priority)

repair_plan: 2. Remove or update the '# type: ignore[attr-defined]' comment since the attribute will be correct
3. Run existing tests to verify the fix doesn't break functionality
4. Ensure the get_user_email_domain method handles None and malformed email addresses gracefully
validation_focus: Syntax: Verify attribute 'email' exists on User model in models.py
Type checking: Ensure mypy or type checker no longer needs ignore comment
Unit tests: Run TestRepositoryEmailDomain tests to confirm domain extraction works
Integration: Test get_user_email_domain with various user IDs including non-existent users
additional_notes: The User model in models.py clearly shows 'email' field, not 'email_address'
The traceback comment '# BUG: Using wrong attribute name' provides explicit confirmation
No changes to models.py needed as the field is correctly defined
Consider adding email format validation in get_user_email_domain to prevent IndexError on malformed emails
